title: colocasia esculenta var. acris
intro: Colocasia esculenta var. acris, also known as the Elephant Ear or Acris Elephant Ear, is a variety of the Colocasia esculenta plant, a type of taro that belongs to the Arum family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Colocasia esculenta var. acris include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant's corms and leaves are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
